author: Dustin Keeton
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Automatically elaborate, transcribe, enrich, summarize, organize, and connect your notes with AI.

manifest.author: Dustin Keeton
manifest.description: Automatically elaborate, transcribe, enrich, summarize, organize, and connect your notes with AI.
manifest.name: Synapse

name: Synapse

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* chore(deps-dev): bump esbuild from 0.27.4 to 0.28.1 in the npm_and_yarn group across 1 directory by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/306
* fix(ci): keep package-lock cross-platform-complete (pin @emnapi top-level deps) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/312
* ci: add build provenance attestations for release assets by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/309
* fix: use window-scoped timer and DOM APIs for popout compatibility by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/310
* chore: remove dead code and unnecessary regex escapes by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/311
* refactor: inject node deps into duration-detector for testability (#271) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/313
* fix: handle unhandled promise rejections in main.ts + add fireAndForget helper (#297) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/314
* fix: handle promise rejections in unified-proposal-view click handlers (#297) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/315
* fix: handle promise rejections in module index files + duration-detector reject (#297) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/316
* chore: enforce promise-handling rules via type-aware ESLint in CI (#297) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/317
* refactor: add json-utils + frontmatter-tag helpers and apply to stores (#296) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/318
* refactor: type AI/provider responses with validated guards (#296) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/319
* refactor: type yt-dlp/ffprobe + oEmbed + JSON-LD external data (#296) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/320
* refactor: clean up assertions/types and enforce type-safety ESLint rules in CI (#296) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/322
* refactor: centralize desktop-only Node access behind a guarded loader by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/324
* fix: adopt Obsidian API & CSS best practices from review by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/325
* chore: bump version to 1.0.2 by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/326

## New Contributors
* @dependabot[bot] made their first contribution in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/306

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/compare/1.0.1...1.0.2

releases.author: dustinkeeton
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* fix: broaden URL detection for YouTube/TikTok edge cases by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/191
* feat: add time-range clipping for audio/video transcription by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/194
* feat: duration-aware time-range slider for transcription clipping by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/196
* feat: add Instagram Reels URL detection for transcription (closes #193) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/197
* feat: mobile-compatible build with lazy Node.js requires by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/198
* chore: bump version to 0.3.2 by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/199


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/compare/v0.3.1...v0.3.2

releases.author: dustinkeeton
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* feat: preserve image embeds (external URLs and internal wiki-links) in AI content by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/161
* feat: add multi-modal AIClient and image OCR module (#162) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/165
* feat: add image analysis to elaboration proposals (#163) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/167
* fix: clean up setTimeout handles and injected styles on unload by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/170
* chore: migrate settings headings from createEl to setHeading() by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/171
* chore: full codebase audit — fix imports, update docs by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/173
* update .claude by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/175
* chore: bump version to 0.3.0 by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/176


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/compare/v0.2.2...v0.3.0

releases.author: dustinkeeton
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* feat: add Reject All button for proposals by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/141
* chore: add .obsidian to .gitignore by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/143
* chore: add authorUrl to manifest.json by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/146
* fix: strip code fences from AI elaboration output by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/147
* feat: add content-aware summary templates with recipe detection by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/148
* feat: require exact ingredient amounts and step images in recipe template by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/152
* feat: extract JSON-LD recipe data to amalgamate ingredients by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/154
* fix: normalize TikTok URLs by stripping query params (#155) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/156
* feat: propose note title changes for Untitled or mismatched titles (#150) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/157
* chore: codebase audit — architecture fixes and docs refresh by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/158
* chore: bump version to 0.2.2 by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/159


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/compare/v0.2.1...v0.2.2
